apps.name: Regram
apps.subtitle: Instagram Tweaks & Enhanced Client
apps.localizedDescription:
Regram for Instagram is a modified version of the official Instagram app designed for advanced users on iOS. It injects additional features into Instagram to expand functionality around viewing, downloading, privacy control, and media handling.

Instead of being a separate social app, it runs on top of Instagram, modifying how the official app behaves by adding extra tools, hidden options, and UI improvements.

privacy.NSFocusStatusUsageDescription: This allows Instagram to check to see if you’ve been missing notifications from friends. You can always change this later in settings.

privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Instagram uses your device's microphone to do things like help you record videos and preview audio effects.

Various developer/debug features exposed for tweaking behavior

apps.name: CyPwn Store
apps.subtitle: Jailbreak Repo & IPA Store for iOS
apps.localizedDescription:
CyPwn Store is a community-driven iOS platform that provides access to a large collection of IPA files, jailbreak tools, and tweak repositories. It functions as a centralized library where users can browse and download modified apps, utilities, and packages designed for sideloaded or jailbroken iOS devices.

The platform is commonly used to explore third-party iOS apps outside of the official App Store ecosystem. It includes support for browsing repositories, downloading packages, and accessing curated lists of tools and applications shared by the community.

CyPwn is designed for advanced users who are familiar with sideloading workflows and alternative app installation methods on iOS.

apps.name: DLiPA
apps.subtitle: IPA Installer & App Store Downloader for iOS
apps.localizedDescription:
DLiPA is an iOS application designed to let users browse, download, and install App Store apps as IPA files directly on their device using their Apple ID. It is inspired by tools like ipatool and focuses on making it easier to manage app downloads, including access to older versions of apps when available.

Version 1.2 improves stability and fixes login-related issues while refining the download process and general performance.

The app supports both jailbroken and non-jailbroken devices, making it a flexible tool for users who want more control over app installation and version management on iOS.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Exchange data with nearby devices running the DLiPA.

apps.name: BundleReader
apps.subtitle: iOS Bundle Inspector & App File Viewer
apps.localizedDescription:
BundleReader is an iOS utility designed to inspect and view the contents of app bundles and packaged application files directly on device. It allows users to explore internal app structures such as resources, metadata, property lists, and other bundled assets in a readable and organized interface.

The tool is primarily intended for developers, testers, and advanced users who need to analyze how iOS applications are structured. It provides a simple way to open bundle directories, navigate file hierarchies, and inspect configuration files without requiring a desktop environment.

BundleReader focuses on lightweight inspection and readability, making it easier to understand app internals for debugging, learning, or development purposes.

apps.name: appdb
apps.subtitle: AppDB iOS Client for IPA Installation & Management
apps.localizedDescription:
AppDB is an iOS client application for the AppDB platform that allows users to browse, manage, and install IPA files directly from their device. Built in Swift, it provides a native interface for interacting with AppDB services, including app discovery, downloads, and installation management.

The app acts as a front-end for the AppDB ecosystem, giving users access to featured apps, search functionality, updates, and device-linked installations. It is designed to simplify sideloading workflows by integrating browsing and installation features into a single iOS application.

This project is open-source and intended for users who want a direct, native way to interact with AppDB content on iOS devices.

apps.name: New OS
apps.subtitle: iOS 11–Inspired Custom iOS Experience Layer
apps.localizedDescription:
NewOS is a community-developed iOS customization project designed to recreate and modernize the look and feel of iOS 11 on newer devices. It focuses on bringing back the visual style, interface behaviors, and design language of classic iOS while adapting it for modern iPhone and iPad hardware.

The project is typically used in sideloaded or heavily customized environments to apply system-wide UI themes, redesigned components, and nostalgic interface elements inspired by iOS 11. It emphasizes simplicity, fluid animations, and a more “classic iOS” user experience compared to newer system designs.

privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: To Use Contacts In New OS

apps.name: PostBox
apps.subtitle: Jailbreak News, Repo Browser & IPA Tool
apps.localizedDescription:
PostBox is a jailbreak-focused utility app designed to help users discover jailbreak-related content, browse repositories, and manage downloadable packages such as tweaks and IPAs in one streamlined interface.

It acts as a hub for jailbreak community resources, offering access to curated news, package listings, and tools that simplify finding and organizing jailbreak-related files. The app is commonly used to keep up with updates in the jailbreak ecosystem and to explore available community packages without manually browsing multiple sources.

PostBox also includes features for downloading and managing files like .deb packages and IPAs, making it easier for users to track and organize jailbreak content from within a single application.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Please allow PostBox to save media into your photo library.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PostBox can save media (such as screenshots and banners) to your photo library.

apps.name: Retro
apps.subtitle: iPod Classic–Style Music Player for iOS & Android
apps.localizedDescription:
Retro is a cross-platform music player designed to recreate the iconic iPod Classic experience on modern devices. Built with Flutter, it delivers a nostalgic, tactile interface inspired by early 2000s portable music players while supporting modern streaming services and mobile playback features.

The app focuses on a clean, scroll-wheel-inspired UI, smooth navigation, and a strong sense of nostalgia. It initially launched with Spotify integration and is expanding toward broader music platform support, including offline libraries and additional streaming services where available.

Retro is open-source and community-driven, aiming to blend vintage design aesthetics with modern mobile functionality for a unique listening experience.

apps.name: Super Mario 64 ios
apps.subtitle: Native Super Mario 64 Port for iOS Devices
apps.localizedDescription:
Super Mario 64 iOS is a community-developed native port of the classic Nintendo 64 platformer, bringing the full 3D adventure to iPhone and iPad. Built from a decompiled recreation of the original game, it allows players to experience Mario’s iconic journey through Peach’s Castle and its surrounding worlds on modern mobile hardware.

This version focuses on delivering an authentic and faithful gameplay experience while adapting controls, rendering, and performance for touch devices. Players can explore fully playable levels, collect Power Stars, and revisit one of the most influential platformers in gaming history.

Super Mario 64 iOS is optimized for modern devices and supports both touch input and external controllers for improved gameplay comfort and precision.

apps.name: sm64ios 30 FPS
apps.subtitle: Super Mario 64 iOS Port (Stable 30 FPS Build)
apps.localizedDescription:
SM64iOS 30 FPS is a community-developed native iOS port of Super Mario 64, designed for maximum stability and compatibility across a wide range of iPhone and iPad devices. Built from a decompiled version of the original game, this build prioritizes consistent performance and smooth gameplay at 30 frames per second.

This version focuses on delivering a faithful recreation of the original Nintendo 64 experience, maintaining accurate physics, level design, and gameplay behavior while optimizing performance for mobile hardware. The locked 30 FPS target ensures stability on lower-end devices and reduces performance fluctuations during gameplay.

Players can explore the full game world, complete classic objectives, and enjoy one of the most influential 3D platformers ever created with modern mobile controls or external gamepads.

apps.name: sm64ios 60 FPS
apps.subtitle: Super Mario 64 Port for iOS (60 FPS Enhanced)
apps.localizedDescription:
SM64iOS 60 FPS is a community-developed native port of Super Mario 64 optimized for iPhone and iPad. Built from a decompiled version of the original game, this project brings the classic 3D platforming experience to iOS devices with modern performance enhancements, including smoother frame rates and mobile-optimized controls.

This version focuses on delivering a stable and responsive experience at 60 FPS on supported devices, improving animation fluidity and input responsiveness compared to the original hardware. Players can explore the entire Castle grounds and iconic levels with touch controls or external gamepad support.

As a fan-made port, SM64iOS is designed for preservation and experimentation, allowing players to experience a landmark title in gaming history on modern mobile hardware.

apps.name: iNDS
apps.subtitle: Nintendo DS Emulator for iOS Devices
apps.localizedDescription:
iNDS is an open-source Nintendo DS emulator designed for iPhone and iPad, allowing users to play compatible Nintendo DS games on modern iOS devices. Built for portability and ease of use, it brings classic dual-screen handheld gaming to mobile hardware with touch-based controls and performance-focused optimizations.

The emulator supports a wide range of Nintendo DS titles, though compatibility and performance may vary depending on the device and game. iNDS is commonly used for retro gaming, preservation, and personal game backups.

Designed with simplicity in mind, iNDS provides features such as save states, customizable controls, and external controller support, making it easier to experience DS games on a touchscreen device.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Need Permission to Access Photos

apps.name: MAME4iOS
apps.subtitle: Classic Arcade Emulator for iOS Devices
apps.localizedDescription:
MAME4iOS is a port of the Multiple Arcade Machine Emulator (MAME) designed to run classic arcade games on iPhone and iPad. It brings decades of arcade history to mobile devices by preserving and emulating a wide variety of vintage arcade hardware and game titles.

Built on the long-standing MAME project, MAME4iOS focuses on accuracy and preservation, allowing users to experience original arcade gameplay as faithfully as possible. It supports thousands of classic arcade titles, though compatibility varies depending on the specific game and hardware requirements.

The app is intended for enthusiasts and preservation-focused users who want to explore or revisit arcade games from gaming history directly on modern Apple devices.

privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: We need bluetooth for steam controllers

apps.name: Play!
apps.subtitle: PlayStation 2 Emulator for Modern Devices
apps.localizedDescription:
Play! is an open-source PlayStation 2 emulator designed to run PS2 games on a variety of platforms, including iOS, iPadOS, macOS, Windows, and Android. It focuses on portability and simplicity, aiming to bring classic PlayStation 2 titles to modern devices without requiring complex system setup or BIOS configuration in many cases.

The emulator is built with compatibility and cross-platform performance in mind, allowing users to experience a wide library of PS2 games with ongoing improvements to accuracy, speed, and graphical rendering. Performance varies depending on the device and game, as PlayStation 2 emulation is highly demanding.

Play! is actively developed as a community-driven project and continues to improve game compatibility and overall stability across supported platforms.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Play! uses the local network to find and communicate with AltServer.

apps.name: Angel Aura Amethyst
apps.subtitle: Minecraft: Java Edition Launcher for iOS & iPadOS
apps.localizedDescription:
Amethyst is an open-source Minecraft: Java Edition launcher designed for iOS and iPadOS devices. It is a continuation of PojavLauncher’s mobile port, rebuilt and maintained by the AngelAuraMC team with improvements focused on compatibility, performance, and modern iOS support.

The launcher allows users to run a wide range of Minecraft Java versions directly on mobile devices, from early legacy builds to newer snapshots, with support for popular mod loaders such as Forge, Fabric, and Quilt. It brings a PC-like Minecraft experience to iOS by adapting rendering, input, and runtime execution to mobile hardware.

Amethyst is intended for advanced users interested in Minecraft modding, testing, and cross-platform gameplay. Because it runs a full Java environment, performance depends heavily on device hardware and configuration.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Angel Aura Amethyst uses the local network to find and communicate with AltServer and LAN servers.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Angel Aura Amethyst uses the microphone to enable support for voice chat mods.

apps.name: PojavLauncher
apps.subtitle: Run Minecraft Java Edition on Mobile Devices
apps.localizedDescription:
PojavLauncher is an open-source launcher that allows you to run Minecraft: Java Edition on mobile devices, including Android and (community-supported) iOS builds. It acts as a compatibility layer that brings the full Java version of Minecraft to handheld platforms by adapting rendering, input, and game execution for mobile hardware.

Designed for advanced users, PojavLauncher provides access to multiple Minecraft versions, mod loaders, and custom configurations, enabling a PC-like Minecraft experience on mobile devices. Performance varies depending on device hardware, game version, and graphical settings.

The project focuses on flexibility and compatibility, making it possible to play modded and unmodded Java Minecraft outside of a traditional desktop environment.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: PojavLauncher uses the local network to find and communicate with AltServer and LAN servers.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PojavLauncher uses the microphone to enable support for voice chat mods.

apps.name: Flycast
apps.subtitle: Sega Dreamcast & Arcade Emulator
apps.localizedDescription:
Flycast is a high-performance emulator focused on bringing classic Sega Dreamcast, NAOMI, and Atomiswave games to modern devices, including iOS, iPadOS, macOS, Windows, and Android. Built for accuracy and speed, Flycast allows users to experience a wide library of retro console and arcade titles with enhanced rendering and modern hardware support.

The emulator is designed to preserve and recreate the original gaming experience while improving compatibility, performance, and visual fidelity through modern graphics APIs. It supports a wide range of games and hardware configurations, making it a popular choice for retro gaming enthusiasts and preservation-focused users.

Flycast is actively developed as an open-source project, with frequent updates that improve game compatibility, performance optimizations, and platform-specific enhancements.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Flycast uses the local network to find and communicate with AltServer.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Flycast requires microphone access to emulate the Dreamcast microphone
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Flycast can save screenshots to your Photo library.

apps.name: DolphiniOS (Public Beta)
apps.subtitle: Public Beta GameCube & Wii Emulator for iOS
apps.localizedDescription:
DolphiniOS (Public Beta) is an early-access experimental version of the Dolphin-based GameCube and Wii emulator for iPhone and iPad. This build is intended for testing, feedback, and development purposes, offering users a preview of ongoing improvements to performance, compatibility, and mobile optimization.

As a public beta, this version focuses on stability testing and feature validation across a wide range of iOS devices. Users can explore supported GameCube and Wii titles, test new rendering and control systems, and help identify issues that guide future development.

Performance and compatibility vary significantly depending on the device model and the game being tested. Some titles may run smoothly, while others may experience graphical glitches, slowdowns, or may not launch at all.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: DolphiniOS uses the local network to find and communicate with AltServer.

apps.name: DolphiniOS
apps.subtitle: GameCube & Wii Emulator for iOS Devices
apps.localizedDescription:
DolphiniOS is an experimental Nintendo GameCube and Wii emulator designed for iPhone and iPad. It brings the capabilities of the Dolphin emulator to iOS devices, allowing users to run compatible console games through software emulation with a focus on performance and mobile optimization.

Built as a mobile adaptation of the well-known Dolphin emulator project, DolphiniOS aims to provide a playable experience for select GameCube and Wii titles on Apple hardware. Performance and compatibility vary depending on the device, game, and configuration, as emulation is highly demanding and still under active development.

The project is primarily intended for advanced users interested in game preservation, emulation testing, and experimental gameplay on mobile devices.

privacy.NSMotionUsageDescription: DolphiniOS uses your device's accelerometer and gyroscope to emulate the Wii Remote's built-in accelerometer and gyroscope.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: DolphiniOS uses the local network to find and communicate with AltServer.

apps.name: Fortnite EZFN Season 12
apps.subtitle: Revisit Fortnite Chapter 2 Season 2 with classic agents, locations, and gameplay.
apps.localizedDescription: Fortnite EZFN Season 12 is an unofficial community-made build that recreates the Chapter 2 Season 2 era of Fortnite, featuring iconic locations such as The Agency, The Shark, The Yacht, and The Grotto, along with the season’s spy-themed gameplay and loot pool. Designed for players who want to experience a classic version of Fortnite, it connects to EZFN's custom servers instead of official Epic Games services. Compatibility varies by build and platform, and the project is not affiliated with Epic Games.

apps.name: Fortnite EZFN Season 7
apps.subtitle: OG Chapter 1 Season 7 Revival Experience
apps.localizedDescription:
Fortnite EZFN Season 7 is a community-run recreation of the original Fortnite Chapter 1 Season 7, designed to bring back the classic winter-themed island, weapons, cosmetics, and gameplay feel from the 2018–2019 era.

This version focuses on preserving the nostalgic experience of early Fortnite, including the snowy map expansion, original movement and combat mechanics, and iconic items from the Season 7 update. Players can revisit familiar locations, explore the frozen island, and experience gameplay closer to the original OG build.

The project is not affiliated with Epic Games and is intended for preservation and nostalgia purposes only.

privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Fortnite needs microphone access for voice chat.

apps.name: EeveeSpotify
apps.subtitle: A modified Spotify client with unlocked premium features and enhanced playback controls.
apps.localizedDescription: EeveeSpotify is an unofficial modified version of the Spotify iOS app that unlocks premium-style features such as ad-free listening, enhanced playback controls, and additional customization options. It is typically installed through sideloading methods and works by patching the official Spotify client to modify certain client-side restrictions. EeveeSpotify is not affiliated with Spotify and is intended for educational and experimental use within the sideloading community.

apps.name: XeniOS
apps.subtitle: Xbox 360 Emulator for iPhone, iPad & Mac
apps.localizedDescription:
XeniOS is an experimental Xbox 360 emulator designed for Apple devices, including iPhone, iPad, and Mac. Built as a specialized fork of the Xenia emulator, it brings console emulation to Apple platforms with a focus on performance, portability, and modern GPU rendering through Metal.

The project is actively evolving and targets advanced users who want to run legally obtained Xbox 360 game backups on mobile and desktop Apple hardware. It supports a shared codebase across all Apple platforms, with platform-specific optimizations for iOS, iPadOS, and macOS.

XeniOS is still in early development, meaning compatibility varies widely depending on the game and device. Some titles may not boot, while others may require significant configuration to achieve playable performance.

apps.name: They Are Coming Zombie Defense (MOD MENU)
apps.subtitle: Survive endless zombie hordes with powerful mod menu features and unlocked upgrades.
apps.localizedDescription: They Are Coming: Zombie Defense (Mod Menu) is a modified version of the zombie survival shooter. Players battle increasingly difficult waves of zombies using weapons, traps, barricades, and equipment while trying to survive as long as possible. This modded build includes additional features such as a mod menu, free shopping, unlimited currency, no ads, and other gameplay-enhancing options depending on the release version. Compatible with modern iOS devices, it is intended for sandbox-style gameplay and experimentation beyond the standard game progression.

apps.name: Angry Birds Star Wars II
apps.subtitle: Join the Pork Side in a Galactic Slingshot Saga
apps.localizedDescription:
Angry Birds Star Wars II continues the epic crossover between the Angry Birds universe and the Star Wars galaxy with an expanded story, new characters, and even more creative physics-based gameplay. Based on the events of the prequel trilogy, this installment lets players experience the rise of the Pork Side in a humorous and action-packed retelling of the saga.

Choose from a massive roster of playable characters inspired by Jedi, Sith, and iconic figures from the Star Wars universe, each with unique abilities, Force powers, and gameplay styles. For the first time, players can also switch sides and play as Imperial and Pork Side characters, offering new strategies and replayability.

Travel across legendary locations such as Naboo, Coruscant, and Tatooine, solving increasingly complex slingshot puzzles while unlocking new characters, upgrades, and hidden secrets. With its expanded content and deeper gameplay systems, Angry Birds Star Wars II builds on the original with even more variety and challenge.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Taking pictures
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Star Wars HD
apps.subtitle: High-Definition Star Wars Slingshot Adventure
apps.localizedDescription:
Angry Birds Star Wars HD is the enhanced high-definition version of the galactic physics-based puzzle adventure that combines the iconic Angry Birds gameplay with the legendary Star Wars universe. Featuring improved visuals, sharper animations, and optimized performance, this edition delivers the full epic saga with a modern graphical upgrade.

Join the Rebel Birds as they battle against the Imperial Pigs across a humorous retelling of the classic Star Wars storyline. Travel through iconic locations such as desert planets, icy bases, and massive space stations while mastering slingshot-based combat infused with Force-powered abilities and blaster mechanics.

Play as reimagined versions of familiar heroes like Luke Skywalker, Leia Organa, Han Solo, and Obi-Wan Kenobi, each with unique powers that change how you solve physics-based puzzles. Face off against Darth Vader, Imperial forces, and challenging boss encounters as you progress through increasingly complex levels.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Taking pictures
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Star Wars
apps.subtitle: A Galactic Slingshot Adventure in the Star Wars Universe
apps.localizedDescription:
Angry Birds Star Wars combines the classic physics-based gameplay of Angry Birds with the iconic characters, locations, and story elements of the Star Wars galaxy. Join the Rebel Birds as they take on the evil Imperial Pigs in a humorous retelling of the original saga, set across deserts, space stations, and galactic battlegrounds.

Play as reimagined versions of beloved characters like Luke Skywalker, Princess Leia, Han Solo, and Obi-Wan Kenobi, each with unique Force-inspired abilities and blaster-style attacks. Face off against Darth Vader, Emperor Palpatine, and the Imperial forces in creative slingshot puzzles that blend strategy, timing, and character powers.

Travel through famous Star Wars-inspired environments, from Tatooine’s sandy deserts to the depths of the Death Star, solving increasingly challenging physics puzzles while unlocking new abilities and upgrades along the way.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Taking pictures
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Space HD
apps.subtitle: High-Definition Zero-Gravity Puzzle Adventure
apps.localizedDescription:
Angry Birds Space HD is the enhanced high-definition edition of the groundbreaking space-based puzzle adventure. Featuring improved visuals, refined animations, and optimized performance, this version brings the cosmic battles between birds and space pigs to life with stunning clarity.

Journey across distant planets, asteroids, and deep-space environments where gravity behaves in unexpected ways. Each level introduces unique gravitational fields that bend trajectories, create orbital paths, and transform every shot into a physics-based challenge set in zero gravity.

Master new space-themed birds with special abilities, exploit planetary pull, and solve increasingly complex puzzles as you progress through visually spectacular cosmic stages. Angry Birds Space HD preserves the innovative gameplay of the original while elevating the experience with modern graphical enhancements.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Taking pictures
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Space
apps.subtitle: Zero-Gravity Physics Puzzle Adventure
apps.localizedDescription:
Angry Birds Space takes the classic slingshot formula beyond Earth and into the cosmos, introducing a groundbreaking twist on physics-based gameplay. Set across mysterious planets, asteroids, and deep-space environments, this adventure challenges players to master gravity itself while battling the evil space pigs.

Each level features unique gravitational fields that bend trajectories, curve flight paths, and create orbit-based puzzles. Players must carefully calculate angles and momentum as they launch birds through zero-gravity space, using planetary pull and orbital mechanics to their advantage.

New space-themed birds with special abilities add even more strategy to the gameplay, allowing for creative solutions to increasingly complex challenges. From icy planets to fiery asteroids, every stage introduces fresh mechanics and visual spectacle.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Taking pictures
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Seasons HD
apps.subtitle: High-Definition Seasonal Puzzle Adventure
apps.localizedDescription:
Angry Birds Seasons HD is the enhanced high-definition edition of the festive physics-based puzzle game that celebrates holidays and seasonal events throughout the year. Featuring improved graphics, smoother animations, and optimized performance, this version delivers the classic seasonal experience with a modern visual upgrade.

Journey through a rotating collection of holiday-themed episodes inspired by celebrations such as Halloween, Christmas, Lunar New Year, Valentine’s Day, and more. Each season introduces unique visual styles, creative level designs, and special puzzle variations while maintaining the core slingshot gameplay that defines the Angry Birds series.

Players must carefully aim and launch birds to destroy pig structures, solve themed challenges, and achieve high scores across hundreds of festive levels. With its combination of timeless gameplay and seasonal creativity, Angry Birds Seasons HD offers a refreshed and visually enhanced way to enjoy the holiday adventures year-round.

apps.name: Angry Birds Seasons
apps.subtitle: Seasonal Physics Puzzle Adventure All Year Round
apps.localizedDescription:
Angry Birds Seasons is a themed expansion of the classic slingshot puzzle gameplay, bringing holiday and seasonal celebrations into the Angry Birds universe. Travel through a rotating collection of festive episodes inspired by real-world holidays and cultural events, each with unique visuals, level designs, and challenges.

From spooky Halloween nights and snowy winter landscapes to festive Lunar New Year celebrations and summer surprises, each season introduces fresh environments while keeping the core physics-based gameplay fans love. Players must launch birds strategically to destroy pig structures, solve puzzles, and complete themed objectives across hundreds of levels.

With its creative seasonal updates, charming presentation, and familiar mechanics, Angry Birds Seasons offers a constantly evolving puzzle experience that stays fresh all year long.

apps.name: Angry Birds Rio HD
apps.subtitle: High-Definition Tropical Rescue Adventure
apps.localizedDescription:
Angry Birds Rio HD is the enhanced high-definition version of the tropical puzzle adventure set in the vibrant world of Rio de Janeiro. Featuring improved visuals, sharper animations, and optimized performance for modern devices, this edition delivers the classic Angry Birds Rio experience with a polished presentation.

The Angry Birds have been kidnapped and taken to exotic locations across Rio, where they must escape captivity and rescue their friends. Players launch birds through colorful environments filled with cages, obstacles, and creative physics-based puzzles inspired by beaches, jungles, and cityscapes.

With its blend of familiar slingshot gameplay and themed rescue missions, Angry Birds Rio HD offers a refreshed way to enjoy one of the most unique entries in the series.

apps.name: Angry Birds Rio
apps.subtitle: Rescue the Birds in a Tropical Adventure
apps.localizedDescription:
Angry Birds Rio takes the classic slingshot gameplay and sets it in a vibrant tropical world inspired by Rio de Janeiro. The Angry Birds are kidnapped and taken to a colorful city where they must escape captivity, rescue their friends, and defeat new enemies in a series of physics-based puzzle challenges.

Instead of the usual pig battles, players face off against smugglers and obstacles in jungle temples, beaches, city rooftops, and exotic locations. Each level introduces creative puzzle designs that combine the familiar Angry Birds mechanics with fresh objectives and environments.

With bright visuals, lively animations, and a soundtrack inspired by the Rio setting, this adventure offers a unique twist on the classic formula while keeping the satisfying destruction and strategic gameplay fans love.

apps.name: Angry Birds Classic HD
apps.subtitle: Classic Physics Puzzle Game, Now in High Definition
apps.localizedDescription:
Angry Birds Classic HD is the enhanced high-definition version of the original physics-based puzzle game that launched one of the most iconic mobile franchises of all time. Experience the classic battle between the birds and the piggies with sharper visuals, smoother animations, and improved presentation optimized for modern devices.

Launch your flock with precision, destroy complex pig-built structures, and recover the stolen eggs across hundreds of carefully designed levels. Each bird has unique abilities that encourage creative strategies and replayability as you aim for the highest scores and perfect three-star completions.

With its timeless gameplay, satisfying destruction physics, and colorful world, Angry Birds Classic HD delivers the definitive way to enjoy the original adventure with upgraded visuals.

apps.name: Angry Birds Go!
apps.subtitle: High-Speed Kart Racing on Piggy Island
apps.localizedDescription:
Angry Birds Go! brings the world of Angry Birds to life in a fast-paced 3D kart racing adventure. Race across the vibrant landscapes of Piggy Island, compete against familiar rivals, and experience thrilling downhill tracks filled with jumps, shortcuts, hazards, and power-ups.

Choose from your favorite Angry Birds characters, including Red, Chuck, Terence, Stella, and more, each with unique special abilities that can help turn the tide of a race. Upgrade karts, improve performance, and customize your ride to gain an edge over the competition.

Compete in a variety of game modes, challenge powerful bosses, unlock new racers, and master increasingly difficult tracks. Whether you're aiming for first place or simply enjoying the ride, Angry Birds Go! delivers exciting racing action for players of all ages.

apps.name: Angry Birds Epic
apps.subtitle: Turn-Based RPG Adventure in Piggy Island
apps.localizedDescription:
Angry Birds Epic is a unique turn-based RPG that reimagines the Angry Birds universe with deep strategy, character progression, and hilarious adventures across Piggy Island. Assemble your team of heroic birds, battle waves of enemy pigs, and upgrade powerful classes, weapons, and abilities as you journey through a colorful fantasy world.

Unlike the classic slingshot gameplay, Angry Birds Epic focuses on tactical combat and team-building. Choose the right bird classes, combine special abilities, and plan your attacks carefully to defeat challenging bosses and conquer increasingly difficult stages.

Explore vibrant environments, collect rare loot, craft equipment, and customize your flock to create the ultimate bird squad. With charming humor, engaging progression systems, and strategic battles, Angry Birds Epic offers a fresh and memorable experience for both Angry Birds fans and RPG enthusiasts.

apps.name: Angry Birds Classic
apps.subtitle: Launch Birds, Defeat Pigs, Save the Eggs
apps.localizedDescription:
Angry Birds Classic is the legendary physics-based puzzle game that started a global phenomenon. Join the flock as they battle the mischievous green pigs who have stolen their eggs, and use strategy, precision, and unique bird abilities to destroy structures and overcome challenging levels.

Master hundreds of handcrafted stages filled with creative puzzles, explosive action, and satisfying destruction. Each bird brings its own special power, allowing players to experiment with different tactics to achieve the highest scores and earn coveted three-star ratings.

Whether you're revisiting a childhood favorite or experiencing the adventure for the first time, Angry Birds Classic delivers timeless gameplay that remains fun, challenging, and rewarding for players of all ages.

apps.name: Geode
apps.subtitle: The Modern Geometry Dash Mod Loader
apps.localizedDescription:
Geode is a powerful open-source modding platform for Geometry Dash that makes discovering, installing, and managing mods easier than ever. Built with stability, performance, and accessibility in mind, Geode provides a modern framework for extending the game with community-created content and enhancements.

Whether you're looking to customize your gameplay experience, improve quality-of-life features, access advanced tools, or create your own modifications, Geode offers everything you need in a single streamlined platform.

apps.name: UTM SE
apps.subtitle: Run Virtual Machines & Emulate Operating Systems
apps.localizedDescription:
UTM SE is a lightweight emulation platform that lets you run classic operating systems and legacy software directly on your iPhone or iPad. Designed for compatibility and ease of use, UTM SE leverages software emulation to provide a portable environment for experimenting with older operating systems, preserving vintage applications, and exploring computing history.

Whether you're revisiting classic versions of Windows, Linux distributions, DOS environments, or other historical operating systems, UTM SE offers a streamlined interface for creating and managing virtual machines on the go.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: The virtual machine may access the local network. UTM may also use the network to communicate with local servers.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Permission is required for any virtual machine to record from the microphone.

apps.name: UTM
apps.subtitle: Run Virtual Machines & Emulate Operating Systems
apps.localizedDescription:
UTM is a powerful virtualization and emulation platform that allows you to run a wide range of operating systems directly on your iPhone, iPad, or Mac. Built on the proven QEMU virtualization framework, UTM makes it easy to create, manage, and use virtual machines for development, education, testing, and legacy software compatibility.

Whether you're running Windows, Linux, macOS, DOS, or other operating systems, UTM provides a user-friendly interface that simplifies the process of setting up and managing virtual environments.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: The virtual machine may access the local network. UTM may also use the network to communicate with local servers.

apps.subtitle: Advanced On-Device Debugger & Developer Toolbox
apps.localizedDescription: StikDebug is a powerful on-device debugging and developer utility suite designed for self-installed iOS applications. Built to help developers, testers, and power users troubleshoot apps directly from their device, StikDebug provides a streamlined environment for monitoring application behavior, viewing logs, inspecting processes, and diagnosing issues without relying on a desktop workflow.

apps.name: iTorrent
apps.subtitle: Torrent Client for iOS with On-Device Download Management
apps.localizedDescription: iTorrent is an open-source BitTorrent client for iOS that allows users to download and manage torrent files directly on their iPhone or iPad. It supports standard torrent features such as magnet links, multiple simultaneous downloads, peer management, and download speed monitoring. Because Apple does not allow torrent clients on the App Store, iTorrent is typically installed through sideloading methods. It is designed for users who want a lightweight, native-style torrent experience on iOS without needing a computer for ongoing use.

apps.name: EnsWilde Mobile
apps.subtitle: Advanced iOS Customizations Without Jailbreaking
apps.localizedDescription: EnsWilde is an advanced iOS customization utility that enables select system-level modifications on supported iPhone and iPad devices without requiring a traditional jailbreak. It operates as a standalone on-device application after a one-time setup process involving a pairing file and a local development VPN. Features include disabling the call recording notification sound, customizing the Apple Wallet background, editing MobileGestalt configuration values, and experimental system patching tools for advanced users. Unlike a jailbreak, EnsWilde does not install package managers such as Cydia or provide unrestricted root access, instead focusing on specific customizations through modern iOS exploitation techniques.

apps.name: Pocket Poster
apps.subtitle: Bring Animated Custom Wallpapers to iPhone Without Jailbreaking
apps.localizedDescription: Pocket Poster is an iOS customization utility that allows users to apply custom animated and video wallpapers to their iPhone or iPad without jailbreaking. By pairing the app with the Nugget desktop tool, users can import wallpaper packages and video-based lock screen backgrounds that integrate with iOS's poster system. It has become popular in the sideloading and customization community because it enables advanced wallpaper personalization on modern iOS versions while remaining accessible to non-jailbroken devices.

apps.name: OldOS
apps.subtitle: Experience Classic iOS on Modern iPhones
apps.localizedDescription: OldOS is a fan-made recreation of the classic iPhone operating system experience, designed to run as an app on modern iOS devices. Inspired by iOS 4, it faithfully reproduces the look, feel, animations, and interactions of early iPhone software, including classic app icons, skeuomorphic design elements, and vintage interface behaviors. Built using modern development tools, OldOS serves as both a nostalgia project and a technical showcase, allowing users to relive the experience of using an early iPhone without requiring older hardware or modifications to their device.

privacy.NSAppleMusicUsageDescription: To view, play, and experience your music in OldOS, please enable access to your music library.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: To take photos in OldOS, please enable access to your camera.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: To view and manage your contacts in OldOS, please enable access to your contacts list.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: To enable maps to work properly, and see your current wifi network in Settings, please enable access to your location. Then close and re-open the Maps app.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: To enable maps to work properly, and see your current wifi network in Settings, please enable access to your location. Then close and re-open the Maps app.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: To enable maps to work properly, and see your current wifi network in Settings, please enable access to your location. Then close and re-open the Maps app.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: To record your audio while filming a video in OldOS, please in enable microphone access.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: To view, manage, and add photos to your photo library in OldOS, please enable access. Then close and re-open the Photos app.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: To view, manage, and add photos to your photo library in OldOS, please enable access. Then close and re-open the Photos app.

apps.name: Rewound
apps.subtitle: Turn Your iPhone Into a Classic iPod Experience
apps.localizedDescription: Rewound was a music player app that transformed an iPhone into a nostalgic iPod-style music player using customizable skins, a virtual click wheel, and haptic feedback. The app integrated with Apple Music and allowed users to recreate the classic iPod experience on modern iPhones. Shortly after its viral launch, it amassed over 170,000 downloads before being removed from the App Store due to concerns about similarities to Apple's iPod design and branding. Despite its removal, Rewound remains one of the most well-known nostalgia-focused music player projects in the iOS community.

privacy.NSAppleMusicUsageDescription: Rewound needs access to your music library to control your music.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Rewound needs access to your library to get the media files.

apps.name: Ksign
apps.subtitle: Lightweight iOS App Signing and Sideloading Made Simple
apps.localizedDescription: Ksign is an iOS app-signing tool that enables users to sign and install IPA files directly on their iPhone or iPad without jailbreaking. It focuses on providing a streamlined, user-friendly experience for managing certificates, provisioning profiles, and app installations entirely on-device. Ksign is commonly used by sideloading enthusiasts who want a straightforward alternative for signing apps with their own certificates, allowing them to install and maintain apps outside of the App Store while retaining control over the signing process.

apps.name: ESign
apps.subtitle: Powerful iOS App Signing and Installation Without a Computer
apps.localizedDescription: ESign is an iOS app-signing utility that allows users to sign and install IPA files directly on their iPhone or iPad using imported certificates and provisioning profiles. It provides tools for managing app signatures, modifying application metadata, and installing apps without requiring a jailbreak. ESign is popular among sideloading enthusiasts because it enables fully on-device signing and app management, reducing reliance on a computer after setup. Its feature set includes certificate management, app installation, and advanced signing options for users who have access to compatible signing certificates.

privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: 开启定位服务，我们将根据您的位置,为您提供相关信息。在未经许可前不会开启定位服务，请放心使用。

apps.name: Feather
apps.subtitle: Advanced On-Device App Signing and Sideloading for iOS
apps.localizedDescription: Feather is an open-source iOS app signing and sideloading platform that allows users to sign, install, and manage IPA files directly on their iPhone or iPad without jailbreaking. Designed for users who want greater control over app installation, Feather supports on-device signing, certificate management, AltStore repository integration, app customization, and advanced features such as tweak injection. It emphasizes privacy and transparency by performing signing operations locally on the device and making its source code publicly available. Feather is commonly used with Apple Developer certificates to provide a reliable and flexible sideloading experience.

apps.name: SideStore
apps.subtitle: Seamless iOS App Sideloading Without Jailbreaking
apps.localizedDescription: SideStore is an open-source iOS app that lets users install and manage apps outside of Apple's App Store by sideloading IPA files. Unlike traditional sideloading methods, it only requires a computer for the initial setup; afterward, apps can be refreshed and maintained directly on the device over Wi-Fi. SideStore uses your Apple ID's personal development certificate to sign apps and helps keep them active through automatic refreshes, all without requiring a jailbreak. It is designed as a community-driven alternative to AltStore and provides users with greater flexibility over the apps they can install on their iPhone or iPad.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: SideStore uses the local network to find and communicate with your device.
